MINI MINUTES: (Joinder) Of Motion To Invalidate And Release Mechanics' Lien.
Appearances: Donald Mah, Esq., Attorney at Law, (650) 755-8601, appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party; David Levine, Esq. of Hirst & Chanler LLP, (510) 848-8880, appearing for Defendant RMH Partnership LLC; No other appearances. Alvarado, Reporter: Connie J. Parchman, CSR 6137
